case_title: MERCEDES D VAN ZANDT VS. SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/27/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-28-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MERCEDES D. VAN ZHANT IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATION COMPANY L.P. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY LELAND WONG, STORE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VAN ZANDT, MERCEDES D AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAN ZANDT, MERCEDES D AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN ZANDT, MERCEDES D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $745.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
